name: halttrace
description: Observer-only local backtraces for halted Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Local backtraces for halted Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: HaltTrace is an observer-only lifecycle hook plugin. It records bounded local event context and writes a local backtrace dump when an anomaly trigger is observed.
defaultPrompt: Use HaltTrace to preserve local backtraces for halted Codex sessions.
Show me the latest HaltTrace dump path for this project.
If a HaltTrace dump exists, run halttrace explain and halttrace handoff before planning recovery.
